paragraphs.text: REAX posted $1.97B in revenue (55.7% YoY) and -$8.1M in net income (-69.5% YoY) for 2025-12-31. Revenue growth coupled with declining net income suggests margin pressure or rising operating costs that bear monitoring in subsequent quarters. The profitability profile is defined by operating margin of -0.5% and net margin of -0.4%, framing the earnings quality behind the headline figures.

Current ratio stands at 1.41x in the locked annual basis, providing a baseline liquidity reference. The quick ratio of 1.41x confirms liquidity depth after excluding inventory from the coverage calculation.

Cash generation is anchored by $66M in operating cash flow (35.3% YoY), which converts to $65M in free cash flow (35.9% YoY). Capital expenditures of $1.1M (0.1% of revenue) reflect the reinvestment intensity required to sustain the current operating base and fund future growth.

### Operating Cash Flow
Operating Cash Flow is currently $66M with 86.4% CAGR. Operating Cash Flow has grown at a 86.4% CAGR.

### Revenue
Revenue is currently $1.97B with 69.0% CAGR. Revenue has grown at a 69.0% CAGR.

### Total Liabilities
Total Liabilities is currently $75M with 65.6% CAGR. Total Liabilities has grown at a 65.6% CAGR.

### Gross Profit
Gross Profit is currently $166M with 62.3% CAGR. Gross Profit has grown at a 62.3% CAGR.

### Watch Items
- **Negative profitability:** Net margin is -0.4%, indicating a loss-making profile.

### What Stands Out
- Revenue is up 55.7% year over year, showing strong top-line momentum.

### Watch Items
- Net margin is -0.4%, indicating a loss-making profile.

### Analyst Interpretation
- Current conclusions are anchored to a period-locked annual basis (2025-12-31).
- Prior comparisons use 2024-12-31; metrics without required inputs remain intentionally unfilled.
